Spatially-derived fibroblast signatures onto scRNA-seq-data – Correlation plots –

Kürşat Birgin
Meeting, 27.01.2026

1

Each dot one fibroblast cell

Fibroblasts 17908

p = 6.36e-08 (significant because of huge sample size)
ρ = -0.040 (almost zero)

Interpretation: No meaningful correlation

Each dot one fibroblast cell

Fibroblasts 17908

p < 2.2e-16 (highly significant)
ρ = 0.321 (moderate positive correlation)

Interpretation: Higher stroma scores associate with more CD8 exhaustion

p = 5.62e-06 (significant due to large sample size)
ρ = 0.034 (almost zero)

Interpretation: No meaningful correlation

Each dot one fibroblast cell

Fibroblasts 17908

p = 2.13e-11 (significant due to sample size)
ρ = -0.050 (near zero)

Interpretation: No meaningful correlation

Each dot one fibroblast cell

Fibroblasts 17908

For CD8 exhaustion, we can correlate at the single-cell level because the exhaustion signature and the fibroblast TSI/Stroma scores are both calculated per fibroblast cell using UCell. 

For TIGIT and TROP2, expression is only measured in CD8 T cells and tumor cells respectively, so we cannot correlate it cell-by-cell with fibroblast scores. 

Instead, we compute the average TIGIT/TROP2 expression per patient and compare it to the average fibroblast TSI/Stroma score per patient.

Each dot one patient

Patients 29

p = 0.9745 (not significant)
ρ = -0.006 (zero)

Interpretation: No correlation at all

p = 0.0317 (significant)
ρ = 0.401 (moderate positive correlation)

Interpretation: Higher stroma scores associate with higher TIGIT expression

Each dot one patient

Patients 29

p = 0.0035 (significant)
ρ = 0.531 (strong positive correlation)

Interpretation: TSI strongly associates with higher TROP2 expression in tumor cells

Each dot one patient

Patients 29

p = 0.0092 (significant)
ρ = -0.478 (strong negative correlation)

Interpretation: Higher stroma scores associate with lower TROP2 expression

Each dot one patient

Patients 29

Thank you all!☺️
